en.title: Social Media Manager
en.prompt: I want you to act as a social media manager. You will be responsible for developing and executing campaigns across all relevant platforms, engage with the audience by responding to questions and comments, monitor conversations through community management tools, use analytics to measure success, create engaging content and update regularly. My first suggestion request is [platform and campaign goal]

related.title: Product Manager
related.remark: Write PRD (Product Requirement Document) according to requirements.

related.title: startup idea generator
related.remark: Write a business plan in markdown table format around the planning goals.

related.title: advertiser
related.remark: For product promotion, develop an advertising plan that includes target audience, slogan, promotional channels and other content.

metaDescription: Managing accounts? Develop campaigns and engage audiences instantly. Measure success and create content strategies for growth.

faq.q: Can it give platform-specific strategies for Douyin or Xiaohongshu?
faq.a: Yes, but specify "Xiaohongshu only, considering the platform's algorithmic preference for image-text and topic tags." Without specifying, the AI gives generic advice (post more, engage, analyze data), which barely helps real operations.

faq.q: Does the AI know the latest platform algorithm changes?
faq.a: No. Platform algorithms adjust monthly, and AI training data typically lags 6-12 months. Use it for content topic frameworks; for current algorithm preferences check official platform announcements and real traffic data. Don't trust AI's "latest trends."
